top_signals.title: The Middle East Power Paradox
top_signals.summary: How the Iran war will transform America’s military role.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Emerging FX Index Edges Up on Peace Deal Ahead of Fed Meeting
top_signals.summary: An index for emerging-market currencies edged higher on Monday as traders weighed the interim peace deal between the US and Iran against uncertainty from the Federal Reserve’s upcoming policy meeting.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Rare-Earth Startup Lines Up $500 Million in Pentagon Funding
top_signals.summary: Rare-earth refiner Phoenix Tailings Inc. received a conditional $500 million loan from the Pentagon, the latest White House deal to boost production of rare-earth elements in the US.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.summary: The alliance has survived 80 years of disagreement—and it will survive again.
